properties.description: Detects when a user attempts to stream on more devices than their subscription tier allows.
properties.query:
// Detect concurrent streams exceeding user's max_streams limit
let timeWindow = 2m;
StreamingEvents_CL
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(15m)
    | where EventType_s == "stream_heartbeat"
    | summarize 
        ActiveSessions = dcount(SessionId_s),
        Devices = make_set(DeviceFingerprint_s),
        MaxAllowed = max(toint(MaxStreams_d))
      by UserId_s, Tier_s, bin(TimeGenerated, timeWindow)
    | where ActiveSessions > MaxAllowed
    | extend ExcessStreams = ActiveSessions - MaxAllowed
    | project TimeGenerated, UserId_s, Tier_s, ActiveSessions, MaxAllowed, ExcessStreams, Devices

alertDetailsOverride.alertDescriptionFormat: User {{UserId_s}} ({{Tier_s}} tier) is using {{ActiveSessions}} concurrent streams, exceeding their limit of {{MaxAllowed}}. Excess: {{ExcessStreams}} streams.
